narrative:
Precinct Union North (precinct in Ross County) has 352 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
